infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: BuddyRent uses your camera for identity verification and video calls.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: BuddyRent accesses your photos to set your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: BuddyRent uses your location to find buddies near you.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: BuddyRent uses your microphone for video verification calls.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow BuddyRent to access your camera.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow BuddyRent to access your photos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow BuddyRent to use your location.
